description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a streamlined, metallic gray fuselage accented by orange and blue markings. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the fuselage, each featuring roundels and orange-tipped edges. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with orange highlights. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark canopy. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a single nose wheel. The overall design suggests a classic jet fighter, likely from the mid-20th century, with visible engine intakes and exhaust at the rear.
description: A sleek, gray jet airplane with swept-back low wings, orange and blue accents, and a forward enclosed cockpit. It features a tricycle landing gear and a single vertical tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings with orange tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the low-mounted swept wing, visible landing gear, and the single vertical tail fin with orange accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the swept wings with roundels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, wing, and tail configuration, as well as the deployed landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine, rear-mounted within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed and deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
